name: podcast-app
description: 小众播客节目单 — 全栈应用工程化配置

scripts.postinstall: echo [postinstall] 根目录依赖安装完成，如需安装前后端依赖请运行: npm run install:all
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.install:ci: npm ci && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.check:all: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend
scripts.clean: npm run clean:frontend && npm run clean:backend
scripts.reset: npm run clean && npm run install:all
scripts.ci:frontend: npm run typecheck --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.ci:all: npm run ci:install && npm run ci:backend-healthcheck && npm run ci:frontend
